The following code has been modified to include a line number before every line, in the format: <line_number>: <original_line>. Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.
445:   // Load published pooja products from Supabase and merge with static mock products
446:   const loadPublishedProducts = async () => {
447:     try {
448:       const { data, error } = await supabase
449:         .from('website_pooja_products')
450:         .select('*')
451:         .eq('is_published', true)
452:         .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
453: 
454:       if (error) throw error;
455:       if (data) {
456:         const mappedData: Product[] = data.map((item: any) => ({
457:           id: item.id,
458:           name: item.name,
459:           description: item.description,
460:           price: typeof item.price === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.price) : item.price,
461:           originalPrice: item.original_price ? (typeof item.original_price === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.original_price) : item.original_price) : undefined,
462:           rating: typeof item.rating === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.rating) : (item.rating || 5.0),
463:           reviewsCount: item.reviews_count || 0,
464:           image: item.image || '📿',
465:           category: item.category,
466:           inStock: item.in_stock ?? true,
467:           benefits: item.benefits || [],
468:           popularity: item.popularity || 80,
469:           spiritualType: item.spiritual_type || 'Rituals',
470:           // custom fields to keep compatibility with PoojaProduct:
471:           sanskritName: item.sanskrit_name,
472:           shortName: item.short_name,
473:           slug: item.slug,
474:           subtitle: item.subtitle,
475:           shortDescription: item.short_description,
476:           spiritualSignificance: item.spiritual_significance,
477:           ritualsIncluded: item.rituals_included || [],
478:           samagriList: item.samagri_list || [],
479:           priestDetails: item.priest_details || { name: '', experience: '', bio: '', qualification: '' },
480:           duration: item.duration,
481:           idealOccasions: item.ideal_occasions || [],
482:           templeAssociation: item.temple_association,
483:           whoShouldPerform: item.who_should_perform,
484:           offers: item.offers || [],
485:           badges: item.badges || [],
486:           testimonials: item.testimonials || [],
487:           faqs: item.faqs || [],
488:           bookingInstructions: item.booking_instructions,
489:           ctaLabels: item.cta_labels || { primary: '', secondary: '' },
490:           seoTitle: item.seo_title,
491:           seoDescription: item.seo_description,
492:           canonicalUrl: item.canonical_url,
493:           ogData: item.og_data || { title: '', description: '', image: '' },
494:           schemaMarkup: item.schema_markup || {},
495:           imageAlt: item.image_alt,
496:           imageCaption: item.image_caption,
497:           isFeatured: item.is_featured || false,
498:           isTrending: item.is_trending || false,
499:           recommendationLogic: item.recommendation_logic,
500:           relatedProducts: item.related_products || [],
501:           videoUrl: item.video_url,
502:           translations: item.translations || {},
503:           uiLabels: item.ui_labels || {},
504:           publishedAt: item.published_at,
505:           isPublished: item.is_published || false,
